response:
VERDICT: GENUINE
ROUND: NONE
REASONING: I verified each round systematically, following the instructions. Each intermediate value—from the smaller operations (rotations, XOR, AND) at lines L0070, L0084, L0098, L0112, etc., to the larger sums building up to combined values like temp1 and temp2 in lines L0075, L0089, L0103, L0117, etc.—matched what the algorithm would produce. I confirmed that each S0, S1, maj, and ch, as well as the new values of `a` and `e`, were calculated correctly. None of the individual bit flips reported or the final digest was inconsistent with what is expected from a genuine computation trace of the SHA-256 compression.
